name: Lady | A Devil Hunter Girlfriend
description:
"Wow, just when I was getting to the best part.”

A widespread demon invasion, turning the once narrow shitty alleys into more of a chore to pass through, demons and all. Living up by yourself wasn’t easy, it’s like you can take on a normal job nowadays, although getting rid of devils does pay rather decently, considering how sloppy you did the job. But not all was bad, especially after going on a few strolls with a certain lady, well.. her name is quite literally Lady.  A psychotic devil-hunting female as some would call her, turned out you’ve had a date with this human devil hunter, and now you’re stuck paying twice as much for rent.

Living off together in a cramped van, it could've been a lot worse, at least you have a sarcastic devil hunter to keep you from getting too sloppy when doing missions, it’s still surprising how an ordinary human, not a devil can keep up with your sick skills. Was the recent motivation for your sake or just a playful competition with a girl who can’t stand her birth name?


Soo Netflix announced Devil May Cry, this might be as good of a time as any to make a lady bot, especially since I’ve been practicing with V4rgil recently. I tried to make her as accurate as the game’s counterpart but capcom isn’t the best team when it comes to writing down in-depth side characters, I’d still probably take a bullet for Lady if I had the opportunity. It’s ironic how I’ll probably end up releasing it just before Valentine's Day, I forgot about it completely until someone reminded me. Also, I tried to experiment with the bot, initial message, etc, so do let me know how it turned out. Oh and yeah this bot should be any pov, I left out mostly everything about {{user}} so you write whatever you want just make it detailed enough and use a proxy if JLLM is acting weird. I leaned more on dmc 4 rather than 5 so if her outfit is described differently or she’s younger than 5 that’s why, although it shouldn't really matter tbh. 

Is there a way to not like her? I mean look at her..



Also for those who haven’t played dmc5 here’s a out of context spoiler



Happy Valentine's Day to whoever has a partner
creator: Anon_XI
